data.name: DirectChildRuleTitle
data.value: Demo layouts should use WinFormsDemo-style containers

data.name: DirectChildRuleMessage
data.value: Add a FlowLayoutPanel to the demo TableLayoutPanel instead of '{0}'

data.name: DirectChildRuleDescription
data.value: Demo layouts should add one FlowLayoutPanel per main table row and place the actual controls inside that flow container.

data.name: AbsoluteRowRuleTitle
data.value: Demo layouts should use absolute table row heights

data.name: AbsoluteRowRuleMessage
data.value: Use an absolute RowStyle height instead of SizeType.Percent in demo layouts

data.name: AbsoluteRowRuleDescription
data.value: WinFormsDemo-style layout uses fixed row heights for the outer demo TableLayoutPanel to keep LVGL controls visible.
